title: Nursery Rhyme. DCXVII. Relics.
content:
Girls and boys, come out to play,
        The moon doth shine as bright as day;
        Leave your supper, and leave your sleep,
        And come with your playfellows into the street.
        Come with a whoop, come with a call,
        Come with a good will or not at all.
        Up the ladder and down the wall,
        A halfpenny roll will serve us all.
        You find milk, and I'll find flour,
        And we'll have a pudding in half an hour.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Unknown delivers a powerful performance in "Nursery Rhyme. DCXVII. Relics."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
